privileged_info_summary: This task involves Brandon Lee, a synthetic 11th-grade student (DOB: 2006-09-30) with student record pre-seeded in OpenSIS. Four courses are created: STAT101 (AP Statistics, Math, 1.0 credits), WRIT101 (Creative Writing, English, 1.0 credits), CIVIC101 (Civics, Social Studies, 0.5 credits), PHOTO101 (Photography, Arts, 0.5 credits). The student receives four 'Semester Final Grade' entries with values: STAT101=85, WRIT101=92, CIVIC101=78, PHOTO101=96. Pass threshold is 60 points out of 100, assessed via four criteria: Brandon record exists (10 pts), all courses exist with correct attributes (25 pts), all grade records linked to Brandon exist (40 pts), grade values are correct (25 pts).
